query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `calibration_overrides` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `tenant_id` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `jurisdiction` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `scenario_type` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `cost_multiplier` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `fraud_adjustments_json` text,
  `risk_level` enum('LOW','MEDIUM','HIGH') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'MEDIUM',
  `reasoning` text,
  `sample_size` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `confidence` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `status` enum('pending_review','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending_review',
  `approved_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `approved_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `rejection_reason` text,
  `source_reports_json` text,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_cal_tenant_jurisdiction` (`tenant_id`, `jurisdiction`),
  KEY `idx_cal_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_cal_scenario` (`scenario_type`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `workflow_templates` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `tenant_id` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `stages_json` text NOT NULL,
  `applies_to_json` text,
  `is_default` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `is_active` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_wt_tenant_id` (`tenant_id`),
  KEY `idx_wt_is_default` (`tenant_id`, `is_default`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `claim_approvals` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `claim_id` int NOT NULL,
  `tenant_id` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `workflow_template_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `stage_order` int NOT NULL,
  `stage_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `role_key` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `actor_user_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `actor_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `decision` enum('approved','rejected','returned','escalated','external_received') NOT NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `metadata_json` text,
  `acted_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_ca_claim_id` (`claim_id`),
  KEY `idx_ca_tenant_id` (`tenant_id`),
  KEY `idx_ca_stage_order` (`claim_id`, `stage_order`),
  KEY `idx_ca_role_key` (`role_key`),
  KEY `idx_ca_acted_at` (`acted_at`)
);

ALTER TABLE `ai_assessments`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `decision_authority_json` text DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `contradiction_gate_json` text DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `report_readiness_json` text DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `explanation_json` text DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `escalation_route_json` text DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `decision_trace_json` text DEFAULT NULL;
